estimated_cost_impact_reasoning: At 55% tariff on CN-origin materials (SM-A, HATU, DMF, DCM, 2-Fluorotoluene), total tariff cost per kg API. Source: MRP sensitivity report tariff_sweep at 55%.
estimated_timeline_reasoning: Tariff escalation does not affect lead times directly.
caveats: Assumes all CN-origin materials subject to the full consolidated rate.
Indirect China exposure (DIPEA) not included in this estimate.
